entries.signature: aiditor.addPanelToDock({ dock, component, path?, title?, props?, transient? })
entries.summary: Add a registered or workspace-file component as a new panel in a runtime dock. If path is provided, the script is loaded before adding the panel.

params.name: input
params.description: Tool input.

params.name: input.dock
params.description: Dock id/name from inspectDocks.

params.name: input.component
params.description: Registered component id.

params.name: input.path
params.description: Optional workspace JS file to load before adding the panel.

params.name: input.title
params.description: Optional panel title.

params.name: input.props
params.description: Optional component props.

params.name: input.transient
params.description: Optional transient panel flag.

entries.summary: List current dock ids, names, viewport rects, panels, active panel, and accept rules so agents can choose a real runtime dock.

params.name: input
params.description: Tool input.

params.name: input.layout
params.description: Optional registered layout name; omit for all layouts.

entries.summary: Notify inspector panels to re-read the current selection after external state changes.
Register the editor-owned provider that turns selected targets of one type into an inspector schema, values, and write handlers.

params.name: type
params.description: Target type matched against target.type or target.kind.

params.name: provider
params.description: Provider with inspect(targets, ctx), plus optional accept(targets).

params.name: meta
params.description: Optional owner/layer metadata; pass { replace: true } only when intentionally replacing an existing provider.

entries.summary: Set the ordered inspector selection. The first target is primary; multi-edit uses only fields present and writable on every target.

params.name: targets
params.description: One target or ordered targets; each target should include type or kind.

params.name: meta
params.description: Optional selection metadata for the host/editor.

entries.summary: Register a component that can be used as a panel, toolbar item, UI tree node, or palette item.

params.name: name
params.description: Unique component id.

params.name: spec
params.description: Component spec with factory(propsSig, ctx), plus optional defaults/dispose/serialize/deserialize/schema metadata.

params.name: meta
params.description: Optional owner/layer metadata, normally supplied by runtime.loadScript.

entries.summary: Reload one existing panel instance after its component file changes. Keeps the same panel id, dock position, title, props, and component.

params.name: input
params.description: Tool input.

params.name: input.panelId
params.description: Existing panel instance id returned by aiditor.inspectDocks.

params.name: input.path
params.description: Optional workspace JS file to load with replace semantics before rebuilding the panel.

params.name: input.component
params.description: Optional safety check; must match the current panel component. Use replacePanel to change component.

entries.signature: aiditor.replacePanel({ panelId, component, path?, title?, props?, transient?, discardDirty? })
entries.summary: Replace one existing panel instance with another component while keeping its dock position. Use reloadPanel after editing the same component file.

params.name: input
params.description: Tool input.

params.name: input.panelId
params.description: Existing panel instance id.

params.name: input.component
params.description: Registered component id.

params.name: input.path
params.description: Optional workspace JS file to load before replacing.

params.name: input.title
params.description: Optional panel title.

params.name: input.props
params.description: Optional component props.

params.name: input.discardDirty
params.description: Must be true to replace a dirty panel.

entries.signature: aiditor.runtime.loadScript({ id?, source?, url?, path?, owner?, layer?, type? })
entries.summary: Execute a workspace or host script with default owner/layer metadata so its registrations can be cleaned up as one contribution group.

params.name: input
params.description: Script loading options.

params.name: input.source
params.description: Inline JavaScript source text. Use source or url.

params.name: input.url
params.description: URL to fetch and execute. Use source or url.

params.name: input.path
params.description: Optional display/sourceURL path, commonly the workspace path.

params.name: input.owner
params.description: Owner attached to registrations made during execution.

params.name: input.layer
params.description: Registration layer, usually workspace, extension, or builtin.

entries.summary: Render a schema-driven property editor for one target or a multi-target batch edit. Multi-target reads use the first target value; writes fan out only through enabled fields.

params.name: opts
params.description: Form options.

params.name: opts.targets
params.description: Targets to edit.

params.name: opts.schema
params.description: Field schema passed to editorFor.

params.name: opts.onChange
params.description: Optional persistence hook: (field, newValue, targets, meta) => void.

params.name: opts.requireAllTargets
params.description: When true, disable fields missing from any target.

params.name: opts.canEdit
params.description: Optional field gate: (field, targets, rawField) => boolean.
